name: tibco-rule-engine
title: Rule Engine
description: Generic YAML-driven document analysis engine. Evaluates externalized rules against any structured document (JSON, XML, YAML, key-value, text lines) and returns structured findings.

display.description: Evaluate YAML rules against structured documents — JSON, XML, YAML, config files, logs

display.name: Parser Override
display.description: Override automatic parser detection. Leave empty to infer from file extension.

outputs.name: findings
outputs.description: Array of issue/warning findings from matched rules

outputs.name: positives
outputs.description: Array of positive/strength findings (GOOD severity rules)

outputs.name: overview
outputs.description: Parsed document overview (name, item counts, structure summary)

outputs.name: success
outputs.description: True if evaluation completed without errors

outputs.name: error
outputs.description: Error message if success is false
